evidence.q1: Section 8 cross-references 'subject to Section 9' and Section 9 exists; numbering is sequential.
evidence.q2: 'Cause' and 'Good Reason' are defined once in Section 2; 'Cause' is used consistently in Section 8.
evidence.q3: All time/quantity phrases are specific: 'six months', '45 days', '50 miles', '25%', no vague terms.
evidence.q4: Language is modern commercial English; no archaic terms like 'hereinabove' or 'witnesseth' appear.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically complete and internally coherent; no broken or self-contradictory sentences.
evidence.q6: Register is uniformly modern and plain; no section diverges into legalese or casual tone.
